name: Daily mod digest with AI summary
description: Posts a once-a-day staff-only digest summarizing yesterday's moderation activity (warns, mutes, bans, top offenders, automod hits) with an AI-written executive summary at the top.
i18nNotes: Header, title, footer, and AI system prompt all reference locale keys. AI output itself is generated content and the recipe explicitly does not pin its language — set persona.locale on the AI module if you need a non-English summary.
